commits.heading: refactor: Wrap sort/group in useTransition and fix filter component layout
commits.body:
- Wrap setSortBy/setGroupBy in useTransition to dim task list during re-render
- Animate task list opacity (0.6 to 1) with transition-opacity duration-150
- Swap filter container transition-all for transition-colors to prevent icon jump
- Keep filter button at fixed h-8 w-8; remove conditional sizing
- Apply flex-1 to filter only when both sort and group are active
- Hide flex-1 spacer when filter uses flex-1 to prevent 50/50 width split
- Remove transition-colors from filter icon for instant color change
- Speed up container (100ms) and chips fade-in (150ms) transitions
- Balance chips right padding (pr-4 to pr-1.5) to eliminate gap

commits.body:

- Add "use no memo" directive to opt component out of compiler memoization
- Add useFormState for error display only (non-critical path)

commits.heading: feat(53-13): enhance notification system by moving Toaster, adjusting z-index, and refining styles

commits.body:
- Implemented changes to allow guest users to access Backup/Sync settings while hiding the "Delete Cloud Data" button.
- Updated `SettingsClient.tsx` to conditionally render account options based on guest mode.
- Added new utility functions for handling uhabits import errors and improved the import process to handle duplicates and remap IDs correctly.
- Enhanced the `mapUhabitsToKanso` function to include color mapping and icon inference based on habit names.
- Added tests for uhabits import functionality and error classification to ensure robustness.
- Updated package.json to include a script for copying the WASM file during preparation.

commits.heading: chore(quick): check build using npm run build (passes clean)
fix(focus): persist slider and switch changes via watch() subscription
commits.body:
Removed the `type === "change"` guard in the watch() callback that blocked
persistence for programmatic setValue() calls. Native DOM inputs set type
to "change" but sliders/switches call setValue() with type: undefined,
so settings were never saved when using sliders or toggles. The safeParse
call already guards against invalid values — no type guard needed.

Adds regression test covering the slider → setValue → watch → updateSettings
path that was previously untested and broken.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.heading: fix(timer): resolve focus settings toggles broken by React Compiler
commits.body:
- Replace watch("field") with useWatch({ control, name }) in SettingsForm for
  React Compiler compatibility — watch() uses an internal pub/sub mechanism the
  compiler cannot track, causing memoized components to skip re-renders on
  setValue() calls (toggles and sliders appeared stuck)
- Stabilize updateSettings useEffect dependency via useRef pattern to prevent
  constant resubscription on every timer tick (TimerProvider recreates context
  object each second due to timer.state changes)
- Add 7 regression tests covering toggle false→true, double-toggle, both toggles
  independent, start-from-true, and schema validation boundaries

commits.heading: feat(53-10): changelog popup with prefetch cache, accessibility, and version scoping
commits.body:
Core:
- Create src/lib/changelog-cache.ts with module-level prefetch cache
- Rewrite ChangelogPopup with instant rendering (no fetch-on-open delay)
- Improve accessibility: font-semibold weights, full contrast colors, readable sizes
- Scope changelog entries to current minor version (e.g. 1.19.x only)
- Show all preview.0 through current preview entries

Pipeline:
- preview.sh: intelligent base commit selection (merge sync for preview.0, last preview for preview.1+)
- Fix changelog.json: preview.0 had 241 ancient commits, reduced to 1 (c9c9409)
- Exclude planning/agent/gemini/husky/vercelignore from commit logs

Updated planning artifacts: ROADMAP.md, STATE.md, 53-10-SUMMARY.md

commits.heading: feat(ui): harden modal accessibility and refine view-specific task visuals
commits.body:
- Hardened modal keyboard accessibility by optimizing Escape key handling in GlobalHotkeys and relying on native Radix UI dismissal for Sheets and Dialogs
- Verified and implemented proper focus traps and ARIA attributes across all core modal components for structural accessibility
- Reverted shared visual unification in favor of distinct view-specific identities, restoring the original Flag icon priority rendering
- Refined TaskGhost specifically for the Board view: reduced base width to 280px, implemented vertical layout, and added the evening moon indicator
- Optimized DragOverlay scaling and rotation across Board and List views for more subtle, professional animations
- Updated TaskSheet to default subtask visibility to collapsed when editing to reduce initial interface clutter
- Fixed visibility logic to ensure completed repeated tasks are correctly rendered in the Mobile Grid view
- Updated phase 53-06 planning and summary documentation and removed obsolete imports
